name: taqat-techno-plugins
description: Professional development skills for Claude Code - Odoo ERP, Azure DevOps, PM best practices, document conversion, video creation, and more

plugins.name: odoo
plugins.description: Unified Odoo development toolkit — upgrade, frontend themes, testing, security auditing, i18n, reports, Docker infrastructure, and server lifecycle across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps integration - manage work items, PRs, pipelines, repos, wiki through natural language via MCP server

plugins.name: ntfy-notifications
plugins.description: Push notifications to your phone via ntfy.sh when Claude completes tasks, needs input, or encounters errors

plugins.name: pandoc
plugins.description: Universal document conversion powered by Pandoc - Convert between 50+ input and 60+ output formats

plugins.name: remotion
plugins.description: Create professional videos with smooth voice narration using Remotion and Claude Code

plugins.name: paper
plugins.description: UI/UX design specialist - design screens, wireframes, and design systems with Figma MCP integration and WCAG accessibility

plugins.name: rag
plugins.description: Operational console for the ragtools local RAG product — install, configure, diagnose, repair, upgrade, and run the local Markdown knowledge base. Knows the Qdrant lock, dual-mode MCP, and known failure modes. Does NOT re-implement search.

plugins.name: react-admin-kit
plugins.description: Reusable patterns for building and auditing React / Next.js admin panels — admin shell, CRUD lists, forms, role-aware UI, dangerous-action confirmations, import/export, RTL/LTR, loading/error/empty states, and the UI-level security rules every admin panel needs (UI hide is not authorization, PII masking, audit visibility, file upload safety). Ships 8 skills + 3 commands (/admin-scaffold, /admin-audit, /admin-role-matrix) + admin-route-auditor agent.

plugins.name: qa-browser
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic browser QA and role-based smoke testing. Drives chrome-devtools / playwright MCP servers to login as each role, walk modals and table actions, verify UI vs API permissions, capture console / network / screenshot evidence, and produce PASS / BLOCKED / NOT-TESTABLE reports for UAT signoff. Ships 9 skills + 5 commands (/qa-target, /qa-smoke, /qa-roles, /qa-route, /qa-report) + 2 agents (qa-evidence-collector, qa-failure-classifier) + production-URL gate hook. Refuses destructive actions on non-disposable data.

plugins.name: docs-wiki
plugins.description: Generic toolkit for creating, organising, editing, validating, and auditing a project Wiki. Adapts to GitHub Wiki sibling repos, in-repo wiki/ folders, GitLab Wiki, and Azure DevOps Wiki. Ships 7 skills + 6 commands (/wiki-init, /wiki-audit, /wiki-update, /wiki-new, /wiki-drift, /wiki-sync-audit) + 3 agents (wiki-link-auditor, wiki-cleanup-validator, wiki-drift-reporter) + push-approval gate + stray-docs warning hooks. Owns flat-namespace + filename-uniqueness + internal-link conventions, Mermaid authoring rules, broken-link sweeps, and code-vs-wiki drift reporting. Does NOT handle wiki-to-memory sync (separate future plugin).
